Hypercolor

RGB lighting orchestration for Linux — open source, Rust-powered, endlessly extensible.

Get Started GitHub
🎨

HTML Effect Engine

Author effects with HTML Canvas, WebGL, or the TypeScript SDK. Full creative freedom.

🔌

Universal Hardware

Razer, Corsair, ASUS, WLED, and more. One engine to rule them all.

🎵

Audio Reactive

Beat detection, FFT analysis, mel bands. Your lights dance to the music.

🗺

Spatial Mapping

Map effects across your entire setup. Room-scale lighting choreography.

🖥

Linux Native

Built for Linux from day one. D-Bus, systemd, Wayland — first-class integration.

⚡

Blazing Fast

60fps render loop in Rust. Zero-copy frame encoding. Sub-millisecond latency.

{% endblock content %}
